game.name: Super Mario Bros.
game.desc: The original Mario adventure. Jump on Goombas, collect coins, and save Princess Peach.

game.name: Contra
game.desc: Run-and-gun classic. Blast through alien forces with a buddy in co-op mode.

game.name: Castlevania
game.desc: Simon Belmont fights through Dracula's castle wielding a whip against monsters.
